name: amz-cli
description: Amazon SP-API CLI for AI Agents — 给 Agent 用的亚马逊命令行工具

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test tests/write-gate.test.mjs tests/broker.test.mjs tests/broker-server.test.mjs tests/preview-token.test.mjs tests/validation.test.mjs tests/retry-policy.test.mjs tests/report-sanitize.test.mjs tests/ads-pagination.test.mjs tests/ads-write.test.mjs tests/keyword-campaign-launch.test.mjs tests/mcp-server.test.mjs tests/mcp-operational-writes.test.mjs tests/account.test.mjs tests/setup.test.mjs tests/listing-update.test.mjs tests/listing-schema.test.mjs tests/listing-mine.test.mjs
